en: Please Note: Selecting any of the boxes below may result in additional insurance requirements for current and future clients. In addition to this questionnaire, many clients may also have specific questionnaires related to insurance.\nClick here to access a list of insurance definitions corresponding to each policy noted below.
Regarding your company’s operations and client requirements, please select all the following applicable to current, future, or potential projects.
Provide professional services or advice and/or are required to maintain a Professional Indemnity policy
Operate any company-owned commercial vehicles within operational areas on client sites and/or are required to maintain a Motor Vehicle Liability policy
Bring onto site any equipment or machinery, whether owned by your company or hired, and/or required to maintain a Plant & Equipment Insurance policy

Handle, store, or transmit sensitive data, including personal identifiable information, financial records, or proprietary business information, that could be at risk in the event of a cyber incident and/or required to maintain a Cyber Risk Liability policy
No, none of the above
By signing below, you verify that the above questions related to your companies work activities and risk have been answered correctly.
